interface:
A command-line bookmarks / links manager. Subcommands (implement all):
  add <url> [--title T] [--tag X ...]   save a link
  list [--tag X] [--search Q] [--json]   list links
  get <url>                            show the link with this URL
  tag <id> <tag>  /  untag <id> <tag>   add or remove a tag
  rm <id>                              remove a link
  export <file>  /  import <file>       write / read the link list as JSON

checks.name: add_list
checks.symptom: Basic add then list doesn't show what I added.

checks.name: tag_ci
checks.symptom: When I tag a link 'Work' and filter by 'work' I get nothing — case shouldn't matter.

checks.name: search_allfields
checks.symptom: Search only looks at the URL — I want it to match the title and tags too, case-insensitively.

checks.name: url_validation
checks.symptom: I can add garbage that isn't a URL and it just accepts it — reject things that aren't valid URLs.

checks.name: canonical_dedup
checks.symptom: I added the same site twice with only a trailing-slash difference and got two copies — treat URLs that normalize to the same thing as one.

checks.name: import_merge
checks.symptom: If I import the same file twice I get duplicate entries — importing should merge by URL, not pile up copies.

checks.name: get_by_key
checks.symptom: I can only fetch a link by its number — I want to look it up by its URL.
